svg.title: From Pain to Venture – Part 08 Reference Images
svg.desc: Reference images for Part 08: Business Model Canvas Validation and Pricing and Unit Economics.
svg.text: From Pain to Venture – Part 08 Reference Images
1. Business Model Canvas Validation
Nine blocks: Customer Segments · Value Propositions · Channels ·
Customer Relationships · Revenue Streams · Key Resources ·
Key Activities · Key Partnerships · Cost Structure
Each block is an assumption — not a finish line.
2. Pricing and Unit Economics
Five dimensions: Willingness to Pay · Revenue Model · Unit Economics · Risk
Pricing is not a finance question. It is a value question.
3. Key principles from Part 08
• Solving a problem is not the same as making money
• Start with industry and market background — not only your product
• Large, reachable, and movable are three different things
• Four confirmation questions: problem → solution → operating model → launch
• Unit economics: do not discover too late that growth loses money
4. Business question
"Can this become a venture system that runs, survives,
absorbs risk, and keeps learning?"
Source: Strategyzer Business Model Canvas
https://www.strategyzer.com/library/business-model-canvas
